creator: rl+fbsd@ciphron.de
text:
Created attachment 212693
Changed build and run dependency of rubygem-rex-exploitation

When updating security/metasploit to version 5.0.79 rubygem-rex-exploitation
needs to be updated as well[1]. 

In my case - I had rubygem-rex-exploitation-0.1.21 already installed but
the dependency in the Makefile did not bumped it to 0.1.22 on update.


thank you,
rl

[1] https://github.com/rapid7/metasploit-framework/commit/2a3f7d8b13d8337618d95c93bffa02132df58701
